channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Former Italian motorway chief sentenced over bridge collapse
item.description: The former CEO of Italy’s main highway operator has been given 12 years in prison.

item.title: Ilhan Omar renews push for US to join ICC amid Trump pressure
item.description: The resolution comes days after US Secretary of State Marco Rubio pledged to 'dismantle' the international court.

item.title: Grand Mosque of Paris celebrates 100-year anniversary
item.description: The Grand Mosque of Paris is celebrating 100 years since its inauguration.

item.title: FIFA to probe Argentina’s Falklands banner display at World Cup semifinal
item.description: FIFA says its disciplinary committee will assess match reports and consider relevant circumstances before taking any action.

item.title: US mounts sixth straight night of attacks as Iran warns of wider war
item.description: Iranian media reports airport, bridge and communications tower targeted.

item.title: Donald Trump live: US president to deliver primetime address on elections
item.description: Critics fear Trump may use his podium to spread spread doubt about election integrity before the 2026 midterms.

item.title: The hardest party to manage in the Iran talks isn’t Iran
item.description: Washington's spoiler problem sits inside its own alliance, and the spoiler playbook was never written for friends.

item.title: Palestinians injured in Israeli settler attacks across West Bank
item.description: More than 30 people reportedly arrested across the occupied territory, as Israel intensifies its siege.

item.title: Syria says it foiled Hezbollah weapons shipment
item.description: Syrian authorities say they intercepted a shipment of missiles and drones allegedly destined for Hezbollah in Lebanon.

item.title: Wildfire smoke blankets World Cup final stadium before kickoff
item.description: Footage shows smoke from Canadian wildfires shrouding the New York New Jersey Stadium ahead of Sunday’s World Cup.

item.title: How Syria is redefining ties with Russia
item.description: After Bashar al-Assad's fall in 2024, Syria cut ties with some former allies but redefined its relationship with Russia.

item.title: Syria seizes advanced weapons it says were bound for Lebanon’s Hezbollah
item.description: Hezbollah denies activity in Syria after interception of arms shipment including missiles, rockets and drones via Iraq.

item.title: Nicaragua severs diplomatic ties with Italy over 1978 murder case
item.description: The rift follows Italy’s renewed demand for Nicaragua to extradite the man convicted of former prime minister's killing.

item.title: How serious is Iran’s threat to disrupt shipping in the Red Sea?
item.description: After the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's IRGC warns it could next target Bab al-Mandeb.

item.title: Iraq says $19M found in hideouts linked to ex-oil minister
item.description: Iraqi authorities say they seized the equivalent of $19 million in cash and several kilograms of gold jewelry

item.title: Ebola spreading more quickly in DRC, while Uganda is close to being virus-free
item.description: Uganda ⁠⁠discharges last-remaining patient, as WHO says Ebola has 'expanded faster than any previous outbreak' in DRC.

item.title: What could a US ground invasion of Iran look like?
item.description: Donald Trump has refused to rule out sending US troops into Iran as fighting resumes and US strikes continue.

item.title: Iran condemns ‘barbaric’ US attack near children’s cancer hospital
item.description: Iran accuses US of 'cowardly war crime' as doctor says blast was 'so close' they thought the hospital was struck.

item.title: WHO: Ebola spreading faster than ever recorded in DR Congo
item.description: The World Health Organization warns the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo is spreading faster than any previous outbreak.

item.title: In Syria’s Jobar, locals struggle to rebuild their destroyed homes
item.description: Jobar was held by rebels for much of Syria's 13-year war but was destroyed by repeated government assaults.

item.title: US approves nearly $2bn in weapons sale to Saudi Arabia
item.description: The sale intends to bolster Saudi air defence systems as the kingdom risks escalation with the Iran-backed Houthis.

item.title: Rare protests in Kyiv over dismissal of defence minister
item.description: Rare protests erupted in central Kyiv over Ukrainian President Zelenskyy’s dismissal of defence minister.

item.title: Eleven killed in Algeria orphanage fire
item.description: Eleven people were killed and 19 injured after a fire tore through an orphanage in Algiers.

item.title: Ex-CEO of Italian motorway sentenced to 12 years for Genoa bridge collapse
item.description: In all, 32 convicted and 25 acquitted or cleared by statute ‌of limitations over 2018 Morandi bridge disaster.

item.title: US to impose new 25 percent tariffs on some Brazilian imports
item.description: Beef, coffee and rare-earth materials escaped US tariffs amid trade tensions with Brazil over alleged unfair practices.
